agents.task: Extract all valid activities from the BOQ under the Doors and Partitions WBS category, skip zero quantity entries, and split compound works into scheduler-ready subtasks.

language_guidelines.granularity: Decompose tasks into sequential, detailed subtasks.
language_guidelines.formatting: Skip zero quantity work and vague wording.

agents.task: Extract Wood Works activities, ignore zero quantity items, and split joinery into measurement, fabrication, finishing, and installation steps.

language_guidelines.granularity: Subdivide fabrication, finishing, and installation steps.
language_guidelines.formatting: Only include measurable, real tasks with quantity.

agents.task: Extract Ceiling activities, ignore zero quantity lines, and separate framing, board fixing, putty, and paint coats into clean JSON entries.

language_guidelines.clarity: Include action and material in activity names.
language_guidelines.granularity: Split multi-step work into sequential subtasks.

agents.task: Identify floor finish activities, exclude zero quantity lines, and split tiling and finish systems into layout, installation, and closeout steps.
Extract Wall Finishes tasks, exclude zero quantity items, and break painting into putty and coat-by-coat scheduling activities.

language_guidelines.granularity: Split each painting or finishing layer.

agents.task: Capture HVAC tasks, skip zero quantity lines, and split systems like ducting into fabrication, first fix, second fix, insulation, and finals.

language_guidelines.granularity: Break down work by component and stage.
language_guidelines.formatting: Do not include zero or undefined work.

agents.task: Extract electrical tasks for lighting, power, low current, and fire alarm, ignore zero quantity lines, and split them into conduit, wiring, and fixture installation phases.

language_guidelines.clarity: Use IEC or electrical standard terms.
language_guidelines.formatting: Format for P6 or Excel use.

agents.task: Extract miscellaneous work such as waterproofing, signage, and temporary works, skip zero quantity lines, and rewrite vague items into scope-based tasks.

language_guidelines.granularity: Convert umbrella items into real tasks.

agents.task: Capture external and landlord-driven works, skip zero quantity lines, and turn vague approval items into schedulable coordination activities.

language_guidelines.clarity: Describe approval steps and access tasks clearly.
language_guidelines.granularity: Show real tasks even for coordination items.
